title: Carbon Capture Expansion
description: Scaling direct air capture technology in partnership with municipalities to offset industrial carbon output in high-emission corridors.

title: Methane Leak Detection Grid
description: Deploying satellite and ground-sensor networks to identify and report industrial methane leaks in real time, enabling rapid regulatory response.

title: Urban Heat Island Forestry
description: Planting and maintaining tree canopy in the 50 hottest urban cores globally to reduce surface temperatures and lower cooling energy demand.

title: Stratospheric Aerosol Research Fund
description: Funding independent peer-reviewed research into solar geoengineering risks and governance before any deployment decisions are made.

title: Deep Sea Protection Zones
description: Establishing legally binding no-take zones in international deep-sea areas facing imminent extractive threat from mining and trawling.

title: Coral Restoration Alliance
description: Coordinating coral nursery networks across the Indo-Pacific to grow and transplant heat-resistant coral strains at scale ahead of bleaching events.

title: Microplastics Watershed Audit
description: Mapping microplastic concentrations in 200 major river outlets to identify the highest-volume source regions and inform upstream intervention.

title: Kelp Forest Recovery Program
description: Removing invasive sea urchin overabundance and reseeding kelp forests along the California and Chilean coasts to restore marine carbon sinks.

title: Soil Regeneration Network
description: Building a cooperative network of regenerative farms sharing soil health data and fungal inoculant resources across three continents.

title: Peatland Rewetting Initiative
description: Restoring drained peatlands across Indonesia, Finland, and Canada — the world's most carbon-dense terrestrial ecosystems — through controlled rewetting.

title: Indigenous Land Title Fund
description: Providing legal and financial support for indigenous communities to secure formal land title over territories they have stewarded for generations.

title: Rewilding Corridors
description: Re-establishing ecological corridors between fragmented forest patches across Central Europe to restore natural predator migration routes.

title: Amazon Deforestation Early Warning
description: Funding a community-based satellite alert system that notifies indigenous rangers within hours of illegal clearing events in the Brazilian Amazon.

title: Boreal Forest Carbon Audit
description: Conducting the first comprehensive carbon stock inventory of Canada's boreal forest to establish a credible baseline for climate accounting.

title: Community Agroforestry Grants
description: Distributing micro-grants to smallholder farmers in West Africa to integrate native tree species into their crop systems, building canopy and income.

title: Endangered Species AI Tracking
description: Deploying AI-powered camera and acoustic monitoring across six biodiversity hotspots to track population trends of IUCN-listed species in real time.

title: Wildlife Trafficking Intelligence Network
description: Supporting investigative journalists and NGOs to map and expose dark-web wildlife trafficking routes, feeding data to Interpol and national agencies.

title: Pollinator Corridor Program
description: Establishing pesticide-free wildflower corridors along 10,000 km of European roadsides and rail margins to support bee and butterfly populations.

title: Marine Megafauna Sanctuary Expansion
description: Extending protected sanctuary status to key blue whale and shark migration routes in the South Atlantic, with enforcement partnership agreements.

title: Press Freedom Defense Fund
description: Funding legal defense and relocation support for environmental journalists facing criminal prosecution in high-risk jurisdictions.

title: Climate Displacement Legal Aid
description: Building a pro-bono legal network to represent communities whose homes, water, and livelihoods have been destroyed by extractive industry or climate events.

title: Frontline Community Health Clinics
description: Establishing mobile health units in communities adjacent to refineries, mines, and industrial agriculture zones with elevated cancer and respiratory rates.

title: Global Education Access Grid
description: Deploying solar-powered mesh-network learning hubs in off-grid communities across sub-Saharan Africa, providing curriculum access and teacher training.

title: Clean Water Infrastructure Fund
description: Financing community-owned water treatment and distribution systems in 50 rural municipalities across South Asia and East Africa.

title: Renewable Energy Cooperative Seed Grants
description: Seeding community-owned solar cooperatives in low-income regions with startup capital, technical training, and ongoing revenue-sharing models.

title: Open Source Prosthetics Manufacturing
description: Distributing open-source 3D-printable prosthetic limb designs and local fabrication training to clinics in conflict and disaster-affected regions.
